posts.author: Tekconnekt (Joseph Lewinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Eveyone!!!

I’m new to Monday, so I don’t really know where to post this (Sounds like it would be an automation?) but I would like to be able to fill in a field, and have that fill in a variable in a link in another column. So for example I want to type in a “ticket number” and have Monday auto-fill the number part of the URL in the next column. Does Monday have a functionality for this?

Thank you!

posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
